formName: Step 4 - Location and Land Details for Other Land
formDescription: This section collects details about land ownership categories, providing fields for legal descriptions and metes and bounds for land that hasn't been formally surveyed.

LandOwnershipCategory.title: What is the category of land ownership?
LandOwnershipCategory.description: Identifies the classification of the land as Private, Provincial Crown, or Other.

LegalDescription.title: Legal Description:
LegalDescription.description: The official legal description of the property parcel.

MetesAndBounds.title: Metes and Bounds (description of unsurveyed land):
MetesAndBounds.description: A technical description of the boundaries for land that has not been formally surveyed.
